{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150956295EE08F690F6919AC55"}"},"total":537},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7346475874727314200","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看来，行文流畅，没有废话。有文字功底。结构层次感很强。剧情展开没有违和娓娓道来。番茄小说里难得的谍战精品。希望作者好好保持。把小说完成。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710488358,"group_id":"7336917000184155161","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"年过半百，白发苍苍。小白书虫，萌新坐家。身残失业，重新启航。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1ybEiFOYW9EEsfo9vGIyLUR2G4qRKoCjCMnwyHDqbJC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/416df0f52ce9467fbe67cbe77a9a9be2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794940&x-signature=RTfHgnzdF6kwS20%2FL5XTnQZtSBM%3D","user_id":"2669208405291211","user_name":"开水白菜🥬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2669208405291211","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7336917000184155161","book_info":{"abstract":"一个人在社会生活通常会扮演很多角色，可能同时是一个家庭的儿子、一个公司的员工、一个国家的公民。
刘松风却不仅仅是这些，一人千面，谍影重重。
在这个风云变幻的年代，刘松风以其聪明才智和过人的胆识，周旋于各方势力之间。他的身份却像一团迷雾，让人难以捉摸。
他的名字无人知晓,但他的功绩永垂不朽。
刘松风说：“在黑暗中醒来，在光明中睡去，这便是我的人生，等我死后就可以出现在光明之下了。”
